title: Week column value v2
excerpt: It would be useful if the week column on the API could provide an week_number and iso_week_number fields. The week number is visible when you click the column so its value exists someplace.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be useful if the week column on the API could provide an week_number and iso_week_number fields. The week number is visible when you click the column so its value exists someplace.
